---
title: "Figure 54"
author: "Mitch Bobbin"
date: "2025-05-08"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(extrafont)  # For font management
library(showtext)
library(sjPlot)

font_add("Calibri", regular = "calibri.ttf", bold = "calibrib.ttf")
showtext_auto()
library(sjPlot)
library(svglite

retail_price<-read.csv("C:/Users/Mitch/Documents/SAFE/Final Figures/Figure 54 - Retail fuel prices/Retail prices.csv")

library(tidyverse)

retail_price<-retail_price %>% 
  select(Report.Date,Gasoline,CNG,LNG,Propane.,Diesel)

retail_price_long <- retail_price %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -`Report.Date`,           # All columns except 'Report Date'
    names_to = "fuel",               # New column for fuel types
    values_to = "price"              # New column for price values
  )

retail_price_long <- retail_price_long %>%
  mutate(Report.Date = as.Date(Report.Date, format = "%m/%d/%y"))


retail_price_long <- retail_price_long %>%
  mutate(
    price = readr::parse_number(price)  # Removes $, commas, and converts to numeric
  )


res_electricity_price<-read.csv("C:/Users/Mitch/Documents/SAFE/Final Figures/Figure 54 - Retail fuel prices/Average_retail_price_of_electricity.csv")
library(tidyverse)

#prices from https://www.eia.gov/electricity/data/browser/#/topic/7?geo=g&agg=0,1&endsec=vg
res_electricity_price_long <- res_electricity_price %>%
  select(matches("Q[1-4]")) %>%       # Select only columns with Q1–Q4
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "quarter",
    values_to = "price"
  ) %>%
  mutate(fuel = "Electricity")        # Add fuel column

# Convert quarter to date, rename column, and reorder columns
res_electricity_price_long <- res_electricity_price_long %>%
  mutate(
    Report.Date = case_when(
      str_detect(quarter, "Q1") ~ paste0(str_extract(quarter, "\\d{4}"), "-01-01"),
      str_detect(quarter, "Q2") ~ paste0(str_extract(quarter, "\\d{4}"), "-04-01"),
      str_detect(quarter, "Q3") ~ paste0(str_extract(quarter, "\\d{4}"), "-07-01"),
      str_detect(quarter, "Q4") ~ paste0(str_extract(quarter, "\\d{4}"), "-10-01")
    ),
    Report.Date = as.Date(Report.Date),
    price = price/100 # convert to same format as other fuel prices. 18.4 cents becomes $.184
  ) %>%
  select(Report.Date, fuel, price)

#now convert price using both gge and electric motor factors:

res_electricity_price_long <- res_electricity_price_long %>% 
  mutate(price=(price*33.7)/3.6) #use 33.7 kwh for a gallon of gas, and divide by 3.6 which
#is an efficiency advantage that electric motors have over gasoline ones

# Bind to the previous long-format retail price data
combined_prices <- bind_rows(retail_price_long, res_electricity_price_long)

#plot it now.
library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(showtext)


combined_prices_plot<-combined_prices %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Report.Date,y=price,color=fuel))+
  geom_line()+
  labs(title=toupper("**Figure 54**: Average Retail Fuel Prices,<br>2000-Present"),
       x="DATE",
       y="PRICE ($)",
       color = "FUEL",
       caption="Source: AFDC & EIA.<br>Electrification Coalition calculations for electricity prices recovered with average residential electricity prices using a<br>Gasoline Gallon Equivalent factor of 33.7 kWh per gallon, divided by the efficiency factor of an electric motor over a combustion engine of 3.6.")+
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Electricity" = "#009BC9",           # EC blue
      "Gasoline" = "#EF5A22",              # EC orange
      "CNG" = scales::alpha("#003554", 0.5),  # EC orange at 70% transparency
      "LNG" = "#003554",  # EC orange at 40% transparency
      "Propane." = "#93c462",               # EC green
      "Diesel" = scales::alpha("#EF5A22",0.5)                 # EC dark blue
    ))+
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2.5))+
    theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_markdown(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 25, family = "Calibri", margin = margin(b = 10)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 15, family = "Calibri"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 16, family = "Calibri"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "#9E9E9E", size = 16, family = "Calibri", face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "#9E9E9E", size = 16, family = "Calibri", face = "bold", margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 1),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 16, family = "Calibri"),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 16, family = "Calibri", face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.key.size = unit(30, "mm"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_markdown(color = "#9e9e9e", size = 15, family = "Calibri", hjust = 0),
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

ggsave(filename = "retail_fuel_prices.svg", plot = combined_prices_plot, width=12, height=8)
```
